raw_consumer_statement: I used my Barclays credit card and purchased a gym membership subscription witXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) on XX/XX/year>. I went to my local XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX to use my subscription but the XXXX XXXX XXXX wouldn't honor my subscription and said they don't accept XXXX XXXX XXXX subscription anymore. XXXX. I have used the XXXX XXXX XXXX subscription to access XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  for many months prior to this day XXXX XXXX. I contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) to ask for a refund since I am not able to receive a service that I paid for but didn't get a refund. Finally I disputed the transaction with Barclay Card stating the above mentioned facts but now Barclay Card is saying the merchant responded with their cancellation policy and my dispute is invalid. I disputed the charge because I wasn't able to receive the service that I paid for not because I wanted to cancel. This should serve as a caution for anyone using Barclay Card to make any purchases.
